title: dryopteris submariformis
intro: Dryopteris submariformis, also known as the aquatic wood fern, is a species of fern that typically grows in aquatic environments. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris submariformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
